description: Enhance oral communication skills in various everyday contexts. Examines how different terminology, phrases, speech styles, and strategies are used to carry on conversations in various real-life situations and practice adopting them. Not open to students with credit for E ASIAN 335 prior to Fall 2019.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 204(or E ASIAN 204 prior to Summer 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 303
